name: Waldorf Style Salad-WW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, sprinkle lemon juice over cored and diced apples.
2. Lightly toss to combine with celery, raisins, and mayonnaise.
3. Mix until thoroughly coated.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. To serve, place lettuce leaf on each salad plate.
6. Top each with an equal amount of apple mixture.
7. Sprinkle each portion with 1 tablespoon sunflower seeds.
